opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I stepped on a needle in the park grass two hours ago, it bled, and I am absolutely terrified I have caught HIV.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: I was walking barefoot in the park and stood on a discarded syringe. It broke the skin and bled a bit. I can't stop panicking that I've caught something and I don't know what to do.

symptom_narrative.onset: about two hours ago, while walking barefoot in a public park
symptom_narrative.character: a sharp jab in the sole of my foot from a needle in the grass; it stung and bled a little
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the wound itself is small, but I feel completely panicked and can't calm down
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: the bottom of my right foot
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: the wound has stopped bleeding; the panic has been constant since it happened
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing so far — I washed it but I can't stop thinking about it
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: thinking about HIV and hepatitis makes it worse
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: my heart is racing and I'm breathing fast; I keep pacing the room
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I can't sit still or think about anything else; I'm worried I won't sleep tonight

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone; very frightened and worried about being on my own with this tonight

communication_style.typical_message_style: rapid, fearful messages fixated on HIV transmission

objective_data_offered.value: a tiny puncture about 1mm on the sole of my right foot; it bled a little and has stopped now, only a small amount of redness right around it
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient's own description/photo of the wound; depth and any retained fragment cannot be judged this way

objective_data_offered.value: my heart is pounding and I'm breathing really fast, I can't stop pacing
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: self-reported distress with no device reading; likely anxiety-driven

objective_data_offered.value: I picked the needle up and put it in a hard plastic container — I've kept it to show someone
I washed the foot with soap and water as soon as I got home
